title: Remove Blindness
description: Prevents the blindness effect from Basic Login, allowing players to see their surroundings while logging in.
body:
# RemoveBlindness

A lightweight mod that prevents the blindness effect from [Basic Login](https://modrinth.com/mod/basic-login) by [BraveCake](https://modrinth.com/user/BraveCake), allowing players to see their surroundings while logging in.

## Features
- Removes only the blindness effect while keeping all other Basic Login security features intact
- Server-side only - no client installation needed
- Zero configuration required

## Usage
1. Install [Basic Login](https://modrinth.com/mod/basic-login) on your server
2. Add this mod to your server's mods folder
3. Start the server

## Credits
Basic Login mod by [BraveCake](https://modrinth.com/user/BraveCake)
